title: Uwarm Zanzibari Rice Pilaf
description: A salty, light Kenyan dish featuring warm water and emulsification without onion or garlic, served in banana leaf for a unique presentation.

ingredients.name: Banana leaf for wrapping (optional, not needed if served in a serving dish)

instructions: Rinse rice thoroughly and soak it in warm water for at least 30 minutes.
Drain soaked rice, reserving the soaking liquid. Stir in reserved liquid and lemon juice with a pinch of salt to taste.
Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add cumin seed if using; stir until fragrant but not burnt.
Pour heated oil mixture into rice along with any additional liquids (juice, water), and mix well. Let sit for about 15 minutes without stirring.
Transfer the seasoned rice to an oven-safe dish or banana leaf. Bake at 150°C (300°F) until slightly crisp on top but still tender, approximately 25-30 minutes depending on thickness of pilaf.
Serve hot in a traditional banana leaf if used as wrap, ensuring it's warm and fragrant.
